text.title: AI Convention Anchoring Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of AI Convention Anchoring.

example.scenario: Repo with 7 modules. Convention 'no print() in production code' lives only in PR comments. Method anchors it: CONVENTIONS.md adds the rule, AGENTS.md per module references it, ruff T20 enforces it in pre-commit.
